title: Teltonika TRB160 4G LTE IoT Gateway
description: The TRB160 is an ultra-small, lightweight, and energy-efficient IoT gateway equipped with mission-critical LTE Cat 6 , Gigabit Ethernet, and a virtual network interface via USB Type-C for simultaneous powering and network data provision. This IoT gateway can reach cellular speeds of up to 300 Mbps with carrier aggregation in a broad range of applications and supports a wide range of industrial-grade protocols for M2M communication Device 9 W PSU (2) Mobile antenna (magnetic mount, SMA male, 3 m cable) USB Type-C cable (0.8 m) hex key Ethernet cable QSG (Quick Start Guide) Packaging box
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, 3G (GSM), 4G (GSM) Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) SMA male LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 Power Power type DC connector Max. power consumption [W] 3,3 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 172 Width [mm] 83 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 74 Hardware CPU Qualcomm, 1.2 Ghz, ARM Cortex-A7 CPU frequency [MHz] 1200 Internal storage [MB] 256 RAM [MB] 128
